summary: A short color-graded vertical video, posted by DHS, set to music with no spoken narration. It shows uniformed Coast Guard personnel at work on the water: a close shot of a woman in a dark uniform jacket with a badge riding aboard a boat with a city shoreline blurred behind, a woman in digital-camouflage Coast Guard fatigues (name tape reading U.S. COAST GUARD) leaning over a chart table using drafting dividers inside a vessel cabin, and an exterior shot of a small cutter's pilothouse with a crew member visible at the controls through the window. It ends on a black card with the white U.S. Department of Homeland Security seal. The audio is a music bed.

script.scene: A woman in a dark uniform jacket with a badge sits aboard a moving boat, a city shoreline blurred behind her.
A woman in digital-camouflage Coast Guard fatigues, name tape reading U.S. COAST GUARD, leans over a chart table working with drafting dividers inside a vessel cabin.
Exterior shot of a small cutter's pilothouse underway, a crew member visible at the controls through the window.
Black end card with the white U.S. Department of Homeland Security seal centered.

notable_text: U.S. COAST GUARD; U.S. DEPARTMENT OF HOMELAND SECURITY
